title: Thawed Rescue Payoff
intendedTensionBeat: A small amount of ice blocks the puppy, but the board is generous after the prior pressure level.
intendedReleaseBeat: A clean ice break cascades into an obvious rescue, making the player feel competent rather than punished.
expectedPath: Break the central ice route, use a clean triple or low-residue clear, then rescue with minimal dock danger.
expectedFailMode: Wrong play is mostly inefficient; repeated side clearing can still delay the rescue but should be recoverable.
designNotes: Recovery/release after L24. This level should make ice feel satisfying and useful.
